action.reasoning: Observation: success_rate still 0.0 after 2M steps (post-eval also 0); eval failed due to model load path error (/ppo_minigrid/ppo_minigrid.zip not found). Analysis: MLP+FlatObs loses spatial info in 7x7 grid, insufficient for navigation; ~200k steps/env too few for sparse-reward Minigrid tasks; DummyVecEnv(8) and current hparams yield no learning signal (value_loss near 0). CNN on image obs is standard for visual gridworlds and should improve feature extraction. Decision: Switch both train.py/predict.py to consistent ImgObsWrapper (channels-first for CnnPolicy), fix robust model loading, use 10 vec_envs + 5M timesteps + ent_coef=0.01 for better exploration, save as explicit zip; submit_eval immediately for new baseline and timing (~15min expected).
